lore.english:
Demon. Hell Knight. Aide of Edwin Black, the leader of a multinational company Nomad. She's always by his side as a secretary and a guard. She is cold to everyone apart from Edwin Black and is not on good terms with Oboro, Nomad's executive.

She's a descendant of a royal class demon. She looks no different from a human being, but boasts strength that far outweighs a human's. She swings a longsword that ignites her enemies on fire.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Demon Swordsmanship[-]
skills.description:
Slashes the enemy 3 times using demon swordsmanship.
[&Provocation]s the target hit at a [&Color_Cyan][R:250102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:250102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Slashes the enemy 3 times using demon swordsmanship.
[&Provocation]s the target hit at a [R:250102]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:250102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Evil Flame Slash[-]
skills.description:
Performs a consecutive sword dance, dealing damage to the enemy 4 times.
Reduces [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target hit by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:250203]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:250203]%[-] chance.
If the target is inflicted with [&Burn], performs an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] 2 times, and if an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] is performed, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:250204]%)[-][&Burn] [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack.
skills.description_readable:
Performs a consecutive sword dance, dealing damage to the enemy 4 times.
Reduces [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the target hit by ([V3:250203]%) at a [R:250203]% chance.
If the target is inflicted with [&Burn], performs an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] 2 times, and if an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] is performed, performs a ([V3:250204]%)[&Burn] [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Gniel's Evil Flames[-]
skills.description:
Wraps black flames around the sword to quickly pierce through the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:250302]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:250302]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:250302] turn(s)
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:250303]%)[-] [&Weaken] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:250303]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:250303] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Wraps black flames around the sword to quickly pierce through the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with ([V3:250302]%) [&Burn] at a [R:250302]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:250302] turn(s)
If the target's [&HP] is less than 50%, inflicts ([V3:250303]%) [&Weaken] at a [R:250303]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:250303] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Black Flame Hell Knight[-]
skills.description:
When attacking an enemy with [&Weaken], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:250401]%) [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate][-] attack.
When attacking an enemy with [&Burn], inflicts a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:250402]%)[-] [&HealRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:250402]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:250402] turn(s)
